summary: User Lookup | Navigate to July in Calendar
gherkin:
When the user Navigate to User Lookup page
And the user Click on "Select A Date Range" button
And the user Navigate to July in the calendar by clicking on the previous button
Then the User Lookup page loads successfully
And the Calendar dropdown appears
And the Calendar shows the month of July

steps.action:
*When* the user Navigate to User Lookup page

*And* the user Click on "Select A Date Range" button

*And* the user Navigate to July in the calendar by clicking on the previous button
steps.result:
*Then* the User Lookup page loads successfully

*And* the Calendar dropdown appears

*And* the Calendar shows the month of July
